title: A Lightning-Fast Three-Flavor Neutrino Oscillation Calculator in Constant-Density Matter with Built-In Uncertainty Propagation
description: Python source code and LaTeX manuscript for a compact three-flavor neutrino oscillation calculator. Implements exact Hamiltonian diagonalization, O(alpha^2) perturbative approximation, a hybrid solver with MSW-resonance switching, Monte Carlo uncertainty propagation, and Jacobian linearization. Parameters follow NuFIT 6.0 (normal ordering). Validated against unitarity, MSW resonance reproduction, and performance benchmarks at 295 km baseline.
